item.description: This article explain why many Nigerians still no fit use auto financing take buy car, even though different schemes dey the market. E talk say car ownership through loans dey mainly benefit high‑incom...

item.title: COA Confirms P73.3 Million OVP Expenses Must Be Returned Under Sara Duterte
item.description: The Commission on Audit (COA) has upheld its notice of disallowance concerning P73.287 million in confidential expenditures by the Office of the Vice President (OVP) under Vice President Sara Duterte....

item.title: Limpopo mother calls for stronger support systems for caregivers of children with disabilities after tragic loss

item.title: VP Sara Duterte Impeachment Hearing: Alleged Bagman Testifies on P125M Confidential Funds and Other Key Philippine News April 14, 2026
